---
title: "Statistics 1"
subtitle: "In-Class Exercise 1"
author: "Yu-You Liou"
date: today
institute: "Shih Chien University"
format:
  revealjs:
    html-math-method: katex
smaller: true
theme: serif
footer: "Elementary Statistics: A Step by Step Approach"
editor: source
slide-number: true
scrollable: false
transition: "none"
menu:
  useTextContentForMissingTitles: false
  hideMissingTitles: true
  side: 'left'
  titleSelector: 'h1'
---

## Question 1

Find the answer of $1 + 1$ using R code.

## Question 2

Find the answer of $3 + 4$ using R code.
